content:
Unfortunately, Windows' error messages can be incomplete or misleading and it could be something deeper, but on the surface it does look like a corrupt lgpllibs.dll file. The first thing to try would be to reinstall the same version (150.0.2?) you're on, using the installer downloaded from the official site:

https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/all/

You should reboot the computer both before AND after you re-install.

Please let us know how it goes.
creator: rednoise
